questionHtml: Outline one factor that could affect the activity of Rubisco.
markschemeHtml:
a. name of factor ✔

b. how it affects rate of reaction ✔

Example answer:

temperature ✔

as the temperature increases the rate of reaction increases until it reaches a maximum and then decreases rapidly ✔

Accept answers in a graph.

meta.title: Outline one factor that could affect the activity of Rubisco.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
